target.name: Etched
target.founder: Gavin Uberti, Chris Zhu, Robert Wachen

methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series B → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.9x) to $5.0B last post money.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 4 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Chips & Semiconductors. Range: $529M - $2.0B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Semiconductors P/S median is 23.4x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

private.name: Positron AI
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Series B), post-money $1B+

data.narrative:
Etched is a Series B chip design company that has raised $620M+ and carries a current post-money valuation of $5.0B. The valuation analysis draws from a peer set of 8 private and 3 public semiconductor companies, including d-Matrix, Positron AI, Substrate, and DEEPX at the private level, alongside ALAB, NVDA, and AMD in public markets.

Two methods yield actionable signals. Stage-progression analysis applies a 1.9x typical step-up multiplier from Series B to subsequent funding, producing an implied valuation of $9.5B. Peer-median triangulation across four same-sector and adjacent-stage comparables yields $1.0B, with a range spanning $529M (DEEPX) to $2.0B (d-Matrix). Public comp anchoring is not applicable because Etched's revenue is not disclosed, precluding use of the 23.4x median price-to-sales multiple observed across the three public semiconductor peers.

The triangulated range across applicable methods is $850M to $10.9B, with a median of $5.2B. The wide spread reflects meaningful tension between forward-looking stage progression ($9.5B) and backward-looking peer medians ($1.0B). The current $5.0B valuation sits at the center of this range but notably above peer medians, suggesting either material competitive differentiation or stage-premium embedded in the last round. Key uncertainties include revenue trajectory (unavailable), margin profile relative to peers, and timing to next institutional event.
